Privacy Policy More Menu About Chris Hi, I'm Chris Elmore, I'm your Labour MP for Bridgend & Porthcawl. I’ve lived in South Wales all my life, and Brynmenyn is where my wife, young son, and I call home. I’m proud to represent our area in Westminster and to work alongside local people, organisations, and businesses to help make our communities stronger, more connected, and better for everyone. For me, being your MP isn’t just about politics, it’s about supporting the people who make our towns and villages what they are. Before coming to Parliament, I worked in further education, office management, and public affairs. I also served as a County Councillor and Cabinet Member in the Vale of Glamorgan, leading on Education and Children’s Social Services, and spent time as an independent member of the Cardiff and Vale Health Board. A lesser known fact is that my first job was as a butcher, which helped teach me the value of hard work, honesty, and community. I care deeply about backing local people, businesses, and charities, and about making sure our communities have the support and resources they need to thrive. Whether it’s helping families, supporting schools, protecting the environment, or championing local businesses, my goal is always the same: to listen, stand up for the area, and do what I can to make Bridgend & Porthcawl an even stronger, fairer place to live and work.
